blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 36°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 40.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 14" over the past week. Current depth: 54".
